messages.inboxEmptyHint: When you book or host a trip, you can message the other party here.
messages.forbidden: You don't have access to this conversation.

home.headline: Explore the Faroe Islands by car
home.conceptTitle: Explore the Faroe Islands your way
home.conceptP1: RentLocal connects travellers with local car owners across the islands. Instead of relying on expensive traditional rental companies, you can rent a car directly from locals and explore the islands at your own pace.
home.conceptP2: Whether you want to drive along dramatic coastal roads, visit hidden villages, or chase waterfalls and mountains, having your own car gives you the freedom to experience the Faroe Islands properly.
home.conceptLocalText: Rent directly from locals across the islands.
home.conceptAirportText: Many cars can be picked up directly at the airport.
home.conceptPricesText: Often cheaper than traditional rental companies.
home.faqA1: You search for a car by dates and location, request to book, and the owner approves. After payment you pick up the car from the owner. All rentals are insured and include 24/7 roadside assistance.
home.faqQ2: Do I need to be approved before I can rent?
home.faqA2: Yes. First-time renters complete a short verification (age 18+ and driving licence). Go to Rent a Car and use Get approved to rent—approval usually within one business day.
home.faqQ3: Can I list my own car?
home.faqA3: Yes. List your car for free, set your price and availability, and get paid when renters book. You need valid insurance and a connected bank account for payouts.

rent.title: Rent a Car
rent.description: Find and book a car from local owners across the Faroe Islands.
rent.heroHeadline: Rent a car from locals across the Faroe Islands
rent.noCarsMatch: No cars match your search. Try different dates or filters.
rent.policyInsuranceNote: All rentals are covered by insurance. 24/7 roadside assistance is included. Please confirm coverage details with the owner before your trip.
rent.insuranceBlockText: Every rental on RentLocal is insured and includes 24/7 roadside assistance.
rent.howStep1Text: Enter your dates and location. Browse available cars and use filters for price, seats, 4x4, and airport pickup.
rent.howStep2Text: Choose a car and send a booking request. When the owner approves, you pay securely online.
rent.howStep3Text: Arrange pickup with the owner—many offer airport pickup. Then enjoy the Faroe Islands at your own pace.
rent.policyDriverRequirements: Drivers must hold a valid driving licence and follow local traffic laws.
rent.availabilitySummary: Bookable from {notice} day(s) in advance, up to {window} day(s) ahead.
rent.bookingNeedsDates: Select pickup and dropoff dates first.
rent.bookingRequested: Booking requested. You can see it in your bookings.
rent.bookingRequestSent: Booking request sent. The owner will respond shortly.
rent.bookingConfirmedMessage: Your payment was successful. Your booking is confirmed. The car owner may contact you with pickup details—check your bookings below.
rent.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. Your booking is still awaiting payment. You can pay from the list below when you're ready.
rent.bookingError: Could not create booking. Please try again.
rent.signInToBookHint: To send a booking request, sign in or create a free account. You can pick dates first, then continue.
rent.mustSignInToBook: We couldn’t confirm you’re logged in. Sign in again to send your booking request—your dates stay on this page after you return.
rent.renterNotApproved: You need to be approved as a renter before you can book. Get approved first—it only takes a moment.
rent.faqQ1: Do I need to be approved before booking?
rent.faqA1: Yes. First-time renters need to complete a short verification (age 18+ and driving licence). Go to Get approved to rent—it usually takes one business day.
rent.faqA2: All RentLocal rentals are covered by insurance and include 24/7 roadside assistance. Confirm details with the owner before your trip.
rent.faqQ3: Can I pick up the car at the airport?
rent.faqA3: Many owners offer airport pickup. Use the Airport pickup filter when searching or check the listing for pickup options.
rent.faqA4: After the owner approves your request, you pay securely online. You only pay once the booking is confirmed.

list.title: List Your Car
list.description: Share your car with tourists and locals. Earn extra income when your car is not in use.
list.heroTitle: Earn money by renting out your car
list.heroSubtitle: List your car on RentLocal and earn money when you're not using it. Tourists across the Faroe Islands are looking for cars every day.
list.heroTrust3: Full control of price and availability
list.howStep1Text: Add photos and basic information about your vehicle.
list.howStep2Text: Travelers request your car for their trip.
list.howStep3Text: Receive payment after each completed rental.
list.whyTitle: Why list your car on RentLocal
list.whyCard1Text: Tourists are looking for cars on the islands every day.
list.whyCard2Text: Set your price, availability, and who can book.
list.whyCard3Text: Verified renters and clear rental terms.
list.uploadHint: Drag photos here or click to upload
list.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your car, its condition, and any special features...
list.wizardAvailabilityHint: Block dates when your car is not available.
list.wizardConfirmInsurance: I confirm that the car has valid insurance
list.wizardConfirmAllowed: I confirm that I am allowed to rent out this vehicle
list.wizardConfirmCorrect: I confirm that the information provided is correct
list.publishSuccessTitle: Your car has been listed successfully
list.publishSuccessMessage: Your listing is now visible on the Rent a Car page.
list.connectRequiredToPublish: To publish your car you need to connect your bank account first (one-time). When you list more cars later, you won't need to do this again.
list.connectPayoutCopy: Get paid when someone books your car. Connect your bank once (about 1 min) – same as Gomore.
list.connectDone: You're set up to receive payouts.
list.testimonial1Quote: We list our car when we're not using it. The extra income helps with maintenance and it's nice to know tourists get to explore the islands.
list.testimonial2Quote: Setting up was quick. I get booking requests, approve who I'm comfortable with, and payment is handled automatically.
list.testimonial3Quote: RentLocal made it easy to share our car. We've had several renters and every experience has been smooth.
list.faqQ1: What are the requirements to list my car?
list.faqA1: Your car must have valid insurance and be roadworthy. You'll need to connect a bank account to receive payments. Listing is free.
list.faqA2: After each completed rental, your earnings are transferred to your connected account. You stay in control of your calendar and pricing.
list.faqA3: Only verified renters can book. They must be at least 18 and have a valid driving licence. You can approve or decline each request.
list.faqQ4: Is my car insured during rentals?
list.faqA4: Rentals are covered by insurance. Make sure your own policy allows commercial or peer-to-peer use, and confirm coverage with your insurer if needed.

auth.name: Name
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorCallbackHint: On mobile, the verification link may open in your email app's browser. Try: long-press the link → «Open in Safari» or «Open in Chrome», or copy the link and paste it into your browser.
auth.magicLinkSent: Check your email for the sign-in link.
auth.confirmEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account details and renter status
profile.completionHint: A complete profile helps when booking or listing
profile.name: Name
profile.bioPlaceholder: A short intro for owners and renters
profile.ownerNotePlaceholder: Optional note shown to people renting your car
profile.renterNotePlaceholder: Optional note when requesting a car
profile.getApprovedDescription: Before your first rental we verify your identity and driving licence. This usually takes a short time.
profile.deleteAccountWarning: This permanently removes your account and all your data. This cannot be undone.

notificationPrefs.title: Notification preferences
notificationPrefs.subtitle: Control optional notifications. Booking confirmations, payments, and security emails are always sent.

renterApproval.title: Get approved to rent
renterApproval.intro: Before you can book a car on RentLocal, you need to be approved as a renter. We verify your age and driving licence to keep the community safe.
renterApproval.forTourists: Visiting the Faroe Islands? You can use your national driving licence or an International Driving Permit (IDP). Upload a clear photo of the front (and back if needed) of your licence.
renterApproval.howText: You must be at least 18 years old and hold a valid driving licence. Enter your date of birth and upload a photo of your licence. We will review your details and usually approve within one business day.
renterApproval.labelDateOfBirthHint: You must be at least 18 to rent.
renterApproval.labelLicensePhotoHint: Upload a clear photo of the front of your licence (JPEG, PNG or WebP, max 5MB). Back side optional for some countries.
renterApproval.requestSuccess: Verification submitted. We will review your details and approve you within one business day.
renterApproval.afterSubmitHint: You can close this page. Check your Profile or try booking a car to see when you're approved (usually within one business day).
renterApproval.alreadyApproved: You are already approved to rent.
renterApproval.under18: You must be at least 18 years old to rent a car.

ownerDashboard.subtitle: See how much you've made from sharing your car
ownerDashboard.youReceiveHint: After our fee (what goes to your bank)
ownerDashboard.howBusyHint: Share of days your car was rented (last 12 months)
ownerDashboard.thisYearHint: From completed rentals in the current year
ownerDashboard.rentersPaidHint: Total amount guests paid for the selected period
ownerDashboard.ourFeeHint: RentLocal's service fee (e.g. 15% of the rental). This is how we run the platform.
ownerDashboard.youGetHint: What you receive after our fee—this is your income from the period.
ownerDashboard.moneyOnTheWayHint: From completed rentals, not yet paid out to you
ownerDashboard.forAccountantIntro: Need a breakdown or a file for your accountant? Choose a period and export a CSV with all details.
ownerDashboard.earningsOverTimeHint: When you earned money (by month, week or day)
ownerDashboard.noData: No completed rentals yet. When guests finish a trip, your earnings will show here.
ownerDashboard.noCars: You don't have any listings yet. Add a car to start earning.
ownerDashboard.noListingsSubtext: When your car is sitting idle, someone else could be exploring the Faroe Islands in it—and you get paid. List your car in a few minutes and decide your price and availability.
ownerDashboard.noListingsBenefit1: You set the price and when your car is available
ownerDashboard.noListingsBenefit2: Get paid securely when guests book. We handle payments and insurance.
ownerDashboard.noListingsBenefit3: See earnings, analytics and payouts all in one place—right here.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.intro: Need help with a booking, listing, or payment? Get in touch and we'll get back to you as soon as we can.
contact.emailDescription: Send us an email anytime. We usually reply within one business day.
contact.emailNotConfigured: Support email not set. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_EMAIL in .env.local.
contact.phoneDescription: You can also call us during opening hours.
contact.phoneNotConfigured: Support phone not set. Add NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPPORT_PHONE in .env.local.
contact.hoursDescription: We answer emails and calls on weekdays. Response times may be longer on weekends and holidays.

about.title: About RentLocal
about.intro: RentLocal is a car-sharing platform for the Faroe Islands. We connect travellers with local car owners so you can explore the islands at your own pace.
about.missionText: We want to make it easy and affordable to rent a car on the Faroe Islands by connecting visitors with locals who are happy to share their car when they are not using it. This gives you access to a wide range of vehicles and often better prices than traditional rental companies.
about.whatWeDoText: We run a website where car owners can list their vehicles and renters can search, compare, and book. We handle payments securely and support both parties before, during, and after each rental.
about.whyText: Renting from locals means you often get a more personal experience, practical tips about the islands, and the option to pick up the car at the airport or in your area. Many of our cars are well-suited for Faroese roads and weather.
about.insuranceSectionText: All RentLocal rentals are covered by insurance and include 24/7 roadside assistance so you can drive with peace of mind.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.intro: Whether you want to rent a car or list your own, here is the process in a few steps.
howItWorks.rentStep1Text: Enter your dates and location (e.g. Tórshavn or Vágar Airport). Browse available cars and filters such as price, seats, and 4x4.
howItWorks.rentStep2Text: Choose a car and send a booking request. The owner will approve or decline. Once approved, you pay securely online.
howItWorks.rentStep3Text: Arrange pickup with the owner. Many offer airport pickup. You get the key and any instructions directly from them.
howItWorks.rentStep4Text: Return the car as agreed. After the rental you can leave a review to help other renters and owners.
howItWorks.listStep1Text: Add photos and details about your car (brand, model, price, location, pickup options). Set your availability and rules.
howItWorks.listStep2Text: To receive payments, connect your bank account via our secure payment partner. This only takes a few minutes.
howItWorks.listStep3Text: When someone requests to book, you can approve or decline. After the rental is completed, you receive your earnings. You stay in control of who rents your car and when.

terms.title: Terms of Use & Privacy
terms.termsIntro: By using RentLocal you agree to use the platform in good faith. RentLocal is a marketplace connecting car owners and renters; the rental agreement is between you and the other party.
terms.termsEligibility: You must be at least 18 years old and hold a valid driving licence to rent. Owners must ensure their vehicle is properly insured and roadworthy. We may verify identity and licence where required.
terms.termsBookings: Bookings are binding once confirmed and paid. Prices and availability are as shown at the time of booking. The owner is responsible for the vehicle; the renter is responsible for use in accordance with the law and any agreed rules.
terms.termsInsurance: All rentals on RentLocal are covered by insurance and include 24/7 roadside assistance. Renters must comply with the policy terms. We recommend that all parties confirm coverage details with the owner before the rental starts.
terms.termsCancellation: Cancellation rules may vary by listing. In general, cancellations before payment can be done without charge; after payment, refunds depend on our cancellation policy and timing. Contact us for specific cases.
terms.privacyIntro: We care about your privacy. This section summarises how we handle your data.
terms.privacyData: We collect information you provide (name, email, phone, payment details for payouts, and listing or booking data) to run the platform, process payments, and communicate with you.
terms.privacyUse: We use your data to operate RentLocal, prevent fraud, improve our service, and comply with the law. We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing.
terms.privacyContact: For questions about your data or to request access or deletion, contact us via the Contact page. We will respond within a reasonable time.

cancellation.title: Cancellation policy
cancellation.intro: This policy explains when and how you can cancel a booking, and what happens to payments.
cancellation.renterP1: Before payment: You can cancel a booking request at any time before you have paid. No charges apply.
cancellation.renterP2: After payment: If you need to cancel after paying, please cancel as soon as possible. Refunds depend on how far in advance you cancel before the rental start date. We will process eligible refunds within a few business days.
cancellation.refundP1: Cancellations more than 7 days before the rental start: full refund. Between 3 and 7 days before: 50% refund. Less than 3 days before start: no refund. Exceptions may apply in special circumstances; contact us to discuss.
cancellation.ownerP1: If you need to cancel an approved booking, please do so as early as possible so the renter can find another car. Repeated cancellations may affect your listing.
cancellation.contactNote: For questions or special circumstances, contact us via the Contact page.
